title: macaranga involucrata var. mallotoides
intro: Macaranga involucrata var. mallotoides, also known as Mallotus philippinensis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against diseases caused by free radicals. Herbal preparations of Macaranga involucrata var. mallotoides include decoctions and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
